description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully before making any changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/mind-map to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to confirm the project compiles without errors
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` completes with exit code 0 and produces output in dist/
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it exits successfully
findings: npm install added 182 packages with 0 vulnerabilities. npm run build completed successfully in 2.17s producing dist/ output. Node.js v22 environment works without issues.
